cityName.description: Indicates the name of the customer's city

cardNamePrinted.description: Indicates the name of the customer's printed card

cardDueDay.description: Indicates the expiration date of the card

totalIncomeAmount.description: Indicates the total amount of the customer's income

requestedTag.description: Indicates if the proposal requested a tag to be shipped with the card

cardNickname.description: Indicates the nickname of the card

skipIncomeAndInvestmentRequirements.description: Used to skip income and investment validation, regardless of the product. Should only be used when aligned with Business

countryCode.description: Indicates country code of the customer's telephone

areaCode.description: Indicates the area code of the customer's phone

namePrinted.description: Indicates the name of the customer's printed card

status.description: Indicates status of proposal (PENDING, ANALYZING, APPROVED, CARD_CREATED, REJECTED, WITH_PROBLEM)

message.example: Message about the status of the proposal

totalIncomeAmount.description: Indicates the total amount of the customer's income

cardNamePrinted.description: Indicates the name of the customer's printed card

customerDocument.description: Indicates which is the customer document

cardDueDay.description: Indicates the expiration date of the card

requestedTag.description: Indicates if the proposal requested a tag to be shipped with the card

cardNickname.description: Indicates the nickname of the card

skipIncomeAndInvestmentRequirements.description: Used to skip income and investment validation, regardless of the product. Should only be used when aligned with Business

status.description: Indicates status of proposal (PENDING, ANALYZING, APPROVED, CARD_CREATED, REJECTED, WITH_PROBLEM)

message.example: Message about the status of the proposal

proposalStatusInformation.description: Indicates status of proposal (PENDING, ANALYZING, APPROVED, CARD_CREATED, REJECTED, WITH_PROBLEM)

customerDocument.description: Indicates which is the customer document

requestedTag.description: Indicates if the proposal requested a tag to be shipped with the card

status.description: Indicates status of limit changed (ANALYZING, APPROVED, CHANGED_LIMIT, PENDING, REJECTED, WITH_PROBLEM)

message.description: Reports the limit status message changed
